inputs.label: Projected Revenue at Exit
inputs.businessContext: The projected annual revenue of the startup at the time of exit (e.g., 5 years from now).

businessContext_i18n.en: The projected annual revenue of the startup at the time of exit (e.g., 5 years from now).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıkış anında (örneğin, bugünden 5 yıl sonra) girişimin tahmini yıllık geliri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der prognostizierte Jahresumsatz des Startups zum Zeitpunkt des Exits (z. B. in 5 Jahren).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le revenu annuel projeté de la startup au moment de la sortie (par exemple, dans 5 ans).
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingresos anuales proyectados de la startup en el momento de la salida (ej., 5 años a partir de ahora).

inputs.label: Net Profit Margin
inputs.businessContext: Expected net profit margin at exit, expressed as a percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected net profit margin at exit, expressed as a percentage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıkışta beklenen net kar marjı, yüzde olarak ifade edilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete Nettogewinnmarge beim Exit, ausgedrückt in Prozent.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Marge bénéficiaire nette attendue à la sortie, exprimée en pourcentage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Margen de beneficio neto esperado a la salida, expresado como porcentaje.

inputs.label: P/E Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Price-to-earnings ratio typical for comparable public companies in the sector.

businessContext_i18n.en: Price-to-earnings ratio typical for comparable public companies in the sector.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sektördeki benzer halka açık şirketler için tipik fiyat-kazanç oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kurs-Gewinn-Verhältnis typisch für vergleichbare börsennotierte Unternehmen der Branche.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Ratio cours/bénéfice typique pour les entreprises publiques comparables du secteur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación precio-beneficio típica de empresas públicas comparables en el sector.

inputs.label: Required ROI
inputs.businessContext: Target return multiple for the investor (e.g., 3x means the investor aims to triple their investment).

businessContext_i18n.en: Target return multiple for the investor (e.g., 3x means the investor aims to triple their investment).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yatırımcı için hedef getiri katı (örneğin, 3x yatırımcının yatırımını üçe katlamayı hedeflediği anlamına gelir).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zielrendite-Multiple für den Investor (z. B. 3x bedeutet, der Investor strebt eine Verdreifachung seiner Investition an).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiple de rendement cible pour l'investisseur (par exemple, 3x signifie que l'investisseur vise à tripler son investissement).
businessContext_i18n.es: Múltiplo de retorno objetivo para el inversor (ej., 3x significa que el inversor busca triplicar su inversión).

inputs.label: Investment Amount
inputs.businessContext: The amount of capital being invested in the startup.

businessContext_i18n.en: The amount of capital being invested in the startup.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Höhe des Kapitals, das in das Startup investiert wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant du capital investi dans la startup.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad de capital invertido en la startup.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
